name: Maple-Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Midwest Living, April 1996
Preheat the oven to 350 degrees. Lightly grease baking sheets.
In a mixing bowl, beat maple syrup, shortening and egg with an electric mixer on medium speed until well combined.
In another mixing bowl, stir flour, baking powder and salt together.
Add the dry ingredients alternately to the syrup mixture with milk, beating with the mixer on low speed after each addition until just combined.
Stir in oats, raisins and nuts with a spoon.
Drop dough by tablespoonfuls onto prepared baking sheets.
Bake for 10 to 12 minutes, or until edges of cookies are lightly browned. Remove and cool cookies on wire racks.
